engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating physical products (plastic jars, bottles, caps) — features, materials, capacity, quality policy — so it's a THING evaluation, not trusting a person or checking a place. Catalog browsing supports product selection rather than being visual-proof portfolio.

goal.one_action: browse the 307-product catalog, add items to a quote cart, and request a quotation / custom-container info

structure.archetype_note: Manufacturer catalog site on WordPress/WooCommerce with a request-for-quote cart (RD$0.00 placeholder prices, 'Ver Cotización'/'Finalizar cotización'), plus a filterable product catalog, industry landing pages, CSR gallery, and multiple contact/job forms.

mapped.observed_as: Política de Calidad y Seguridad de Productos
¿Por qué elegir nuestros productos y servicios?
Acciones de Responsabilidad Social Empresarial (CSR: beach cleanups, sidewalk rebuild, waste collection)
certification badge images on Sobre Nosotros (3, unlabeled)
Solicitar información / Envía tus datos (CV) / Buscar productos
WhatsApp Santo Domingo / WhatsApp Zona Norte
Contacto — three office locations, hours, phone, fax

unmapped.observed: Productos catalog with quote-cart (Ver Cotización / Finalizar cotización, add-to-cart, wishlist, RD$0.00 prices)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical section models a browsable product catalog wired to a request-for-quote cart/checkout; 'pricing' implies price display and 'features' is a copy section, neither captures inventory + cart mechanics.

unmapped.observed: Buscar productos filter sidebar (reference, capacity, color, material, product type)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A faceted catalog filter is a catalog-app affordance, not a persuasion section.

proposed_new.name: quote-cart
proposed_new.evidence: WooCommerce catalog with add-to-cart ('Select options', 'Agregar a lista de deseos') and 'Ver Cotización' → /cart → 'Finalizar cotización' → /checkout, all prices RD$0.00 — a request-for-quotation cart flow with no payment, distinct from storefront-checkout (which transacts one-time goods with real prices).

design_style.none_fits_because: design_hints capture is empty (no fonts, colors, or light/dark); insufficient signal to assign one of the six styles. Manufacturer content leans authority/professional but not evidenced.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full with all 6 pages, forms, CTAs, and commerce state captured; classification is unambiguous (catalog + quote-cart manufacturer, not a single-action page).

gap_findings: in_icp false: the site's job is catalog browsing + a request-for-quote cart/checkout across 307 products, not one conversion action — engines/sections cannot express faceted catalog + quote-cart.
The quote-cart pattern (cart/checkout that produces a quotation, not a payment, with RD$0.00 placeholder prices) is a distinct commerce mode not covered by storefront-checkout or catalog.
Multiple distinct forms on one page (info request, job application w/ CV upload, catalog filter) exceed the single leadForm section model.
Multi-location contact block (3 offices, no map embed) + dual-region WhatsApp lines is a map-hours-adjacent need not represented in proof/section vocab.
